subcodes.first_line: O thou who art an aid to knowledge and learning! Knowest thou how thou hast become a manifestation of infinite favors and the recipient of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای معین علم و داناای هیچ دانی که چگونه مظهر الطاف نامتناهی گشتی و مورد فضل و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @education of children; moral education
